turns.user_question: Marcus, please walk me through your day from arriving at work until you went home.
turns.suspect_answer:
I arrived at the office around 7:30 AM as usual. The investor reception was scheduled for that evening, so I spent most of my day preparing for it. We had a few last-minute meetings with some of our investors to go over the company's financials and projections. After lunch, I took care of some administrative tasks, like responding to emails and updating some spreadsheets.

I remember leaving the office around 8:30 PM to head home. It was a pretty standard evening for me – just got back, had dinner with my family, watched TV for a bit... That's about it.
